mapper.sql: id, employee_number, employee_name, credit_type, activity_name, activity_date, credits, description, attachment_url, create_time, update_time, `Modifier__number`
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_manual_enter_credit
AND employee_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{employeeNumber}, '%')
AND employee_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{employeeName}, '%')

SELECT
FROM t_manual_enter_credit
AND employee_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{employeeNumber}, '%')
AND employee_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{employeeName}, '%')
ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_manual_enter_credit ( employee_number, employee_name, credit_type, activity_name, activity_date, credits, description, attachment_url, create_time, update_time, `Modifier__number` ) VALUES ( #{employeeNumber}, #{employeeName}, #{creditType}, #{activityName}, #{activityDate}, #{credits}, #{description}, #{attachmentUrl}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{modifierNumber} )

INSERT INTO t_manual_enter_credit ( employee_number, employee_name, credit_type, activity_name, activity_date, credits, description, attachment_url, create_time, update_time, `Modifier__number` ) VALUES
( #{item.employeeNumber}, #{item.employeeName}, #{item.creditType}, #{item.activityName}, #{item.activityDate}, #{item.credits}, #{item.description}, #{item.attachmentUrl}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.modifierNumber} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_manual_enter_credit SET employee_number = #{employeeNumber}, employee_name = #{employeeName}, credit_type = #{creditType}, activity_name = #{activityName}, activity_date = #{activityDate}, credits = #{credits}, description = #{description}, attachment_url = #{attachmentUrl}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, `Modifier__number` = #{modifierNumber} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT employee_number, last_name FROM t_personal_credit WHERE employee_number IN
#{n}
